title: Pre-flight script + SKILL.md phase split for test-loop startup optimization
description: Runner agent wastes 14+ tool calls reading files before starting work. Two changes: (1) Create pre-flight.sh that merges health-check + gate + trend summary into one compact JSON call. (2) Split 800-line SKILL.md into phase-specific files (phases/common.md, SCAN.md, GENERATE.md, TEST.md, FIX.md, VERIFY.md, state-update.md) so test-loop only reads ~150 lines per invocation instead of 800. Update runner and test-loop spawn prompts accordingly.
